title: abutilon hirtum var. yuanmouense
intro: Abutilon hirtum var. yuanmouense is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family, commonly known as the velvet flower or Chinese bellflower. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Abutilon hirtum var. yuanmouense include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its roots can also be dried and used in herbal remedies.
